ddls:
CREATE TABLE "procurement_requests" (
  "request_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each procurement request */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department making the request */,
  "request_date" TEXT /* Date the request was submitted */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the goods or services being requested */,
  "estimated_cost" REAL /* Estimated cost of the procurement */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the procurement request (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority of the request (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the procurement category */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the procurement type */,
  "requestor" TEXT /* Name of the person who made the request */,
  "justification" TEXT /* Detailed justification for the request */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_procurement_requests_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES procurement_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_procurement_requests_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_procurement_requests_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES procurement_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "purchase_orders" (
  "po_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each purchase order */,
  "request_id" INTEGER /* ID of the procurement request the PO is generated from */,
  "po_date" TEXT /* Date the PO was created */,
  "vendor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vendor being contracted */,
  "total_cost" REAL /* Total cost of the PO */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the PO (e.g., open, closed, cancelled) */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the procurement category */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the procurement type */,
  "payment_method_id" INTEGER /* ID of the payment method */,
  "delivery_date" TEXT /* Expected delivery date */,
  "terms_and_conditions" TEXT /* Specific terms and conditions for the PO */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("po_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_purchase_orders_request_id FOREIGN KEY ("request_id") REFERENCES procurement_requests ("request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_purchase_orders_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES procurement_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_purchase_orders_payment_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("payment_method_id") REFERENCES payment_methods ("method_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_purchase_orders_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES procurement_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vendors" (
  "vendor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vendor */,
  "vendor_name" TEXT /* Name of the vendor */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the vendor */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address of the vendor */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the vendor */,
  "vendor_type" TEXT /* Type of vendor (e.g., local, national) */,
  "rating" TEXT /* Performance rating of the vendor */,
  "registered_date" TEXT /* Date the vendor was registered with the system */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the vendor (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vendor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contracts" (
  "contract_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contract */,
  "po_id" INTEGER /* ID of the PO the contract is associated with */,
  "contract_date" TEXT /* Date the contract was signed */,
  "contract_type" TEXT /* Type of contract (e.g., TIPS, DIR TSO, Sole Source) */,
  "contract_amount" REAL /* Total amount of the contract */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date the contract expires */,
  "payment_schedule" TEXT /* Payment schedule details */,
  "performance_bond" TEXT /* Indication if a performance bond is required */,
  "penalties" TEXT /* Penalties for non-compliance */,
  "contract_manager" TEXT /* Contract manager */,
  "contract_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the contract */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contract_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contracts_po_id FOREIGN KEY ("po_id") REFERENCES purchase_orders ("po_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "po_id" INTEGER /* ID of the PO the payment is associated with */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the payment was made */,
  "payment_amount" REAL /* Amount of the payment */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., check, electronic funds transfer) */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., pending, completed) */,
  "payment_reference" TEXT /* Reference number for the payment */,
  "payment_method_id" INTEGER /* ID of the payment method */,
  "payment_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the payment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_payment_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("payment_method_id") REFERENCES payment_methods ("method_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_po_id FOREIGN KEY ("po_id") REFERENCES purchase_orders ("po_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated to the department */,
  "department_head" TEXT /* Head of the department */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the department */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the department */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "procurement_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each procurement category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the procurement category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the procurement category */,
  "category_head" TEXT /* Head of the category */,
  "category_description" TEXT /* More detailed description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "procurement_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each procurement type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the procurement type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the procurement type */,
  "type_description" TEXT /* More detailed description of the type */,
  "type_requirements" TEXT /* Specific requirements for the procurement type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payment_methods" (
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment method */,
  "method_name" TEXT /* Name of the payment method */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the payment method */,
  "method_description" TEXT /* More detailed description of the method */,
  "method_requirements" TEXT /* Specific requirements for the payment method */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_trail" (
  "trail_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit trail entry */,
  "table_name" TEXT /* Name of the table affected */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* ID of the record affected */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action taken (e.g., insert, update, delete) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the action */,
  "user_id" TEXT /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "user_role" TEXT /* Role of the user who performed the action */,
  "action_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trail_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "budget_allocations" (
  "allocation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each budget allocation */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department receiving the allocation */,
  "budget" REAL /* Amount of the budget allocation */,
  "fiscal_year" INTEGER /* Fiscal year the allocation is for */,
  "allocated_by" TEXT /* Person who allocated the budget */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* Date the budget was approved */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the allocation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("allocation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_budget_allocations_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "expenditures" (
  "expenditure_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each expenditure */,
  "po_id" INTEGER /* ID of the PO the expenditure is associated with */,
  "expenditure_date" TEXT /* Date of the expenditure */,
  "expenditure_amount" REAL /* Amount of the expenditure */,
  "expenditure_category" TEXT /* Category of the expenditure */,
  "expenditure_type" TEXT /* Type of the expenditure */,
  "expenditure_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the expenditure */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("expenditure_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_expenditures_po_id FOREIGN KEY ("po_id") REFERENCES purchase_orders ("po_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contract_amendments" (
  "amendment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contract amendment */,
  "contract_id" INTEGER /* ID of the contract being amended */,
  "amendment_date" TEXT /* Date of the amendment */,
  "amendment_description" TEXT /* Description of the amendment */,
  "amendment_reason" TEXT /* Detailed reason for the amendment */,
  "amended_by" TEXT /* Person who made the amendment */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* Date the amendment was approved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("amendment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contract_amendments_contract_id FOREIGN KEY ("contract_id") REFERENCES contracts ("contract_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vendor_contacts" (
  "contact_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vendor contact */,
  "vendor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vendor being contacted */,
  "contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the contact */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address of the contact */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the contact */,
  "contact_position" TEXT /* Position of the contact */,
  "contact_status" TEXT /* Current status of the contact (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "contact_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the contact */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contact_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vendor_contacts_vendor_id FOREIGN KEY ("vendor_id") REFERENCES vendors ("vendor_id")
)
